Short CV

Neşe ŞEKERCİ was born in İstanbul, graduaded Üsküdar Girls High School, Ege University She graduated from Hacettepe University School of Nursing in 1980-1985. She has a pedagogical formation document.

For nearly a decade the Faculty of Medicine General Surgery Department has worked as a nurse in charge of floor. Then, has begun the Master's program at Istanbul University Istanbul Faculty of Medicine and Child Health Institute of Developmental Neurology Department, "Cerebral Palsy and convulsions Employees Thoughts on the Role of the Nurse Pediatrics Clinical Nursing Care in Case" was the master's degree with thesis.

In 1995 she began working School as an instructor in Istanbul University Bakırköy Medical School. She entered lessons as an instructor in Istanbul University Bakırköy Medical School in the Department of Surgical Nursing; also in the same school Coordinator of the Department of Medical Laboratory, I.Ü. Bakirkoy Health School Intern Program Application Coordinator and two-term were Deputy Director of the Health Sciences in I. U. Bakırköy Medical School.

Şekerci who Between 2010-2012 was lecture and head of department in Istanbul Kavram Vocational School Child Development Program; has been working in Üsküdar University Faculty of Health Sciences the Department of Child Development and Health Services Vocational School serves on the Child Development program from the 2012- 2013 academic year.
